languages.text: {n}Себериан, совладав с потрясением, смеривает вас недобрым взглядом.{/n} "Помутнение оставило вас, {name}? Превосходно. А теперь соизвольте объяснить, почему вы, называя себя Вольным Торговцем фон Валанциус, так легко предали родича смертельному врагу? Не верится, что вы и впрямь мой потомок".

traits.locale_text: [draft] Заминка позволила Себериану чуть прийти в себя, он обвиняет нас в том, что мы с такой радостью передали его Инквизиции там, в ловушке этого ксеноса. Может упоминуть Ювенну в духе, что неужели все его потомки такие.

languages.text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан, совладав с потрясением, смеривает вас недобрым взглядом.{/n} "Помутнение оставило вас, {name}? Превосходно. I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? languages.text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción y te lanza una mirada siniestra.{/n} «¿Ya ha recuperado el sentido, {name}? Excelente. Ahora, haga el favor de explicarme por qué alguien que se proclama Comerciante Independiente von Valancius entregaría tan fácilmente a un pariente a su enemigo mortal. Me resulta difícil de creer que verdaderamente sea mi descendiente».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian supera la conmoción y te lanza una mirada siniestra.{/n} «¿Ya ha recuperado el sentido, {name}? Excelente. Ahora, haga el favor de explicarme por qué alguien que se proclama Comerciante Independiente von Valancius entregaría tan fácilmente a un pariente a su enemigo mortal. Me resulta difícil de creer que verdaderamente sea mi descendiente».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，恶狠狠地盯着你。{/n}“你的脑子清醒过来了吗，{name}？很好。那就劳驾你解释清楚，为何你自称冯·瓦兰修斯家的行商浪人，却如此轻易地就把自己的血亲交给我们不共戴天的仇敌？我实在难以相信你真是我的后裔。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安压下震惊，恶狠狠地盯着你。{/n}“你的脑子清醒过来了吗，{name}？很好。那就劳驾你解释清楚，为何你自称冯·瓦兰修斯家的行商浪人，却如此轻易地就把自己的血亲交给我们不共戴天的仇敌？我实在难以相信你真是我的后裔。”

languages.text: {n}Sous le choc, Seberian tâche de se maîtriser et vous dévisage d'un œil torve.{/n} « Vous avez retrouvé vos esprits, {name} ? Tant mieux. À présent, veuillez avoir l'obligeance de m'expliquer pourquoi vous, qui vous prétendez {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} de la dynastie von Valancius, êtes si {mf|prompt|prompte} à livrer un parent à son ennemi mortel ? J'en viens à douter que nous partagions le même sang. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sous le choc, Seberian tâche de se maîtriser et vous dévisage d'un œil torve.{/n} « Vous avez retrouvé vos esprits, {name} ? Tant mieux. À présent, veuillez avoir l'obligeance de m'expliquer pourquoi vous, qui vous prétendez {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} de la dynastie von Valancius, êtes si {mf|prompt|prompte} à livrer un parent à son ennemi mortel ? J'en viens à douter que nous partagions le même sang. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, şoku üzerinden atıyor ve sana öfke dolu bir bakış fırlatıyor.{/n} "Aklın başına geldi mi {name}? Mükemmel. Şimdi kendine Hür Tacir von Valancius diyen senin, bir akrabanı neden bu kadar kolayca ölümcül bir düşmana teslim ettiğini açıklama lütfunda bulun. Gerçekten benim soyumdan geldiğine inanmakta güçlük çekiyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

Şimdi kendine Hür Tacir von Valancius diyen senin, bir akrabanı neden bu kadar kolayca ölümcül bir düşmana teslim ettiğini açıklama lütfunda bulun. Gerçekten benim soyumdan geldiğine inanmakta güçlük çekiyorum."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは驚きを鎮め、あなたを睨みつける。{/n}「気が戻ったのか、{name}。よかった。では、なぜ、あなたは自らを「ローグ・トレーダー・フォン・ヴァランシウス」と名乗るにもかかわらず、血縁者を敵に簡単に引き渡したのかを説明してほしい。あなたが私の血を引く者だと信じることが難しい。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent. Now, be so good as to explain why you, who name yourself a Rogue Trader von Valancius, would so readily surrender a kinsman to a mortal enemy? I find it difficult to believe you are truly my descendant."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは驚きを鎮め、あなたを睨みつける。{/n}「気が戻ったのか、{name}。よかった。では、なぜ、あなたは自らを「ローグ・トレーダー・フォン・ヴァランシウス」と名乗るにもかかわらず、血縁者を敵に簡単に引き渡したのかを説明してほしい。あなたが私の血を引く者だと信じることが難しい。」

languages.text: {n}Seberian überwindet seinen Schock und sieht dich unheilvoll an.{/n} "Seid Ihr wieder bei klarem Verstand, {name}? Ausgezeichnet. Dann erklärt mir doch bitte, warum Ihr, {mf|der|die} Ihr Euch selbst als {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} von Valancius bezeichnet, so bereitwillig einen der Euren einem Todfeind ausliefert? Es fällt mir schwer, zu glauben, dass wir tatsächlich verwandt sind."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian masters his shock and fixes you with a baleful glare.{/n} "Have your wits returned to you, {name}? Excellent.
